---
title: "Problem Set 3"
author: "Annie Wang"
format: html
knitr: 
  opts_chunk: 
    echo: true
    eval: true
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(xml2)
library(rvest)
library(chromote)
```

```{r}
url <- "https://www.c-span.org/congress/members/?congress=119&congressyear&chamber=senate&visual&find-name=all&find-state=all&find-party=all&status=all&sort-names=name&all"
members_page <- read_html(url)
member_nodes <- members_page %>%
  html_elements("section.people.tiled.parties ul li")

length(member_nodes)
```

```{r}
node <- member_nodes[[1]]
text_node <- node %>% html_element("div.text")
text_node %>% html_text2()

```

```{r}

member_nodes <- members_page %>%
  html_elements("section.people.tiled.parties ul li")

parse_member <- function(node) {
  
  text_node <- node %>%
    html_element("div.text")
  
  name <- text_node %>%
    html_element("a.name h3") %>%
    html_text2()
  
  org <- text_node |>
    html_element("span.organization") %>%
    html_text2()
  
  party <- str_sub(org, 1, 1)
  state <- str_sub(org, 3, 4)
  
  profile_url <- text_node %>%
    html_element("a.name") %>%
    html_attr("href")
  
  profile_url <- paste0("https:", profile_url)
  
  tibble(
    name = name,
    party = party,
    state = state,
    profile_url = profile_url
  )
}

senators_df <- map_dfr(member_nodes, parse_member)

senators_df
```



```{r}
# change the profile url to correct format
to_canonical_cspan <- function(url) {
  m <- stringr::str_match(url, "/person/\\?(\\d+)/(.*)$")
  if (is.na(m[1, 1])) return(url)

  id <- m[1, 2]
  name_raw <- m[1, 3]

  name_slug <- name_raw |>
    stringr::str_replace_all("([a-z0-9])([A-Z])", "\\1-\\2") |>
    stringr::str_replace_all("\\.", "") |>
    stringr::str_replace_all("[^A-Za-z0-9]+", "-") |>
    stringr::str_to_lower() |>
    stringr::str_replace_all("-+", "-") |>
    stringr::str_replace_all("^-|-$", "")

  paste0("https://www.c-span.org/person/", name_slug, "/", id, "/")
}

senators_df <- senators_df |>
  mutate(profile_url_canonical = purrr::map_chr(profile_url, to_canonical_cspan))

senators_df
```

```{r}
# Test
parse_profile <- function(profile_url, max_tries = 3) {
  for (i in seq_len(max_tries)) {
    cat("Trying:", profile_url, " attempt ", i, "\n")

    out <- tryCatch({
      page <- rvest::read_html_live(profile_url)
      Sys.sleep(runif(1, 4, 7))

      nodes <- page$html_elements("li#person-bill-list-119")
      cat("nodes found:", length(nodes), "\n")

      if (length(nodes) > 0) {
        section_text <- nodes[[1]] |>
          rvest::html_text2() |>
          stringr::str_squish()
      } else {
        body_nodes <- page$html_elements("body")
        if (length(body_nodes) == 0) {
          return(tibble(
            sponsored_bills_119 = NA_integer_,
            main_topic_119 = NA_character_
          ))
        }

        section_text <- body_nodes |>
          rvest::html_text2() |>
          stringr::str_squish()
      }

      sponsored_bills_119 <- stringr::str_extract(
        section_text,
        "(?<=Bills Sponsored:)\\s*\\d+"
      ) |>
        as.integer()

      main_topic_119 <- stringr::str_extract(
        section_text,
        "(?<=Commonly Sponsored Bill Policy Areas:)\\s*.*?(?=Amendments:|Bills Co-Sponsored:)"
      ) |>
        stringr::str_squish()

      if (identical(main_topic_119, "")) {
        main_topic_119 <- NA_character_
      }

      tibble(
        sponsored_bills_119 = sponsored_bills_119,
        main_topic_119 = main_topic_119
      )
    }, error = function(e) {
      cat("ERROR:", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
      NULL
    })

    if (!is.null(out) && (!is.na(out$sponsored_bills_119[1]) || !is.na(out$main_topic_119[1]))) {
      return(out)
    }

    Sys.sleep(runif(1, 3, 6))
  }

  tibble(
    sponsored_bills_119 = NA_integer_,
    main_topic_119 = NA_character_
  )
}
```

```{r}
batch_size <- 10

batch_index <- split(
  seq_len(nrow(senators_df)),
  ceiling(seq_len(nrow(senators_df)) / batch_size)
)

run_one_batch <- function(rows) {
  senators_df[rows, ] |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      profile_data = purrr::map(profile_url_canonical, parse_profile)
    ) |>
    tidyr::unnest(cols = c(profile_data))
}

batch_results <- purrr::map(batch_index, function(rows) {
  cat("\n========================\n")
  cat("Running batch:", min(rows), "to", max(rows), "\n")
  cat("========================\n")

  out <- run_one_batch(rows)

  Sys.sleep(10)

  out
})

senators_full <- dplyr::bind_rows(batch_results)

senators_full |>
  dplyr::select(name, sponsored_bills_119, main_topic_119) |>
  dplyr::slice_head(n = 10)
```

```{r}
senators_full
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)

top_10 <- senators_full |>
  arrange(desc(sponsored_bills_119)) |>
  slice_head(n = 10)

bottom_10 <- senators_full |>
  arrange(sponsored_bills_119) |>
  slice_head(n = 10)

top_10
bottom_10
```

```{r}
party_summary <- senators_full |>
  group_by(party) |>
  summarise(
    avg_bills = mean(sponsored_bills_119, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_bills = median(sponsored_bills_119, na.rm = TRUE),
    count = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

party_summary
```

```{r}
topic_summary <- senators_full |>
  count(main_topic_119, sort = TRUE)

topic_summary
```

```{r}
ggplot(top_10, aes(x = reorder(name, sponsored_bills_119), y = sponsored_bills_119)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Top 10 Senators by Bills Sponsored (119th Congress)",
    x = "Senator",
    y = "Number of Sponsored Bills"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
ggplot(party_summary, aes(x = party, y = avg_bills)) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(
    title = "Average Bills Sponsored by Party",
    x = "Party",
    y = "Average Number of Bills"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
